In [2]:
def recover_counts(adata):
    adata_raw = adata.uns["layers_counts"].copy()
    adata_raw = adata_raw[adata.obs_names, adata.var_names]
    return adata_raw.X

def perform_scvi(adata):
    import scvi
    import torch
    torch.set_float32_matmul_precision('high')

    adata_scvi = adata[:, adata.var["highly_variable"]].copy()
    scvi.model.SCVI.setup_anndata(adata_scvi, layer='counts', batch_key='sample')
    vae = scvi.model.SCVI(adata_scvi, n_layers=2, n_latent=30, gene_likelihood="nb")
    vae.train()
    return vae

    'Mast MS4A3⁺': 'Mast_c1_MS4A3',
    'Mast TPSAB1⁺': 'Mast_c2_TPSAB1',

    'Mph alveolar APOE⁺': 'Mph_c1_APOE',
    'Mph alveolar CCL2⁺': 'Mph_c2_CCL2',

    'Mph alveolar SCGB3A1⁺': 'Mph_c4_SCGB3A1',
    'Mph cycling': 'Mph_c5_MKI67',
    'Mph mitochodrial-active': 'Mph_c6_LGALS3',
    'Mph preivascular': 'Mph_c7_F13A1',
    'cDC1': 'DC_c2_CLEC9A',
    'cDC2': 'DC_c3_CD1E',
    'pDC': 'DC_c4_CLEC4C',
}
myeloid.obs['final_celltype'] = myeloid.obs['anno_lv3'].map(final_dict)

In [38]:
import scvi
import torch
adata_scvi = myeloid[:, myeloid.var["highly_variable"]].copy()
lvae = scvi.model.SCANVI.from_scvi_model(
    vae,
    adata=adata_scvi,
    labels_key="final_celltype",
    unlabeled_category="Unknown",
)
lvae.train(max_epochs=40, n_samples_per_label=20)
